constraints.ocl:
context MaintenanceTask
inv: (self.machine <> null) and (self.isDone = true)

context Workshop
inv: self.lines->exists(x | x.isActive <> true)

context BillOfMaterials
inv: self.items->any(x | x.requiredQty >= 1) <> null

context Plant
inv: self.suppliers->any(x | x.name <> '') <> null

context ProductionLine
inv: self.stations->any(x | x.stationId <> '') <> null

context Shift
inv: self.endTime <> null and self.startTime <> null

context Shift
inv: self.startTime <> null and self.endTime <> null

context Shift
inv: self.endTime <> null implies self.startTime <> null

context Shift
inv: self.startTime <> null implies self.endTime <> null
